name: taskara-agent
description: Codex workflow helper for the Taskara team task manager.

interface.shortDescription: Create, search, update, and plan Taskara work from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds Taskara task-management workflows to Codex using the Taskara API. Optimized for team projects, follow-ups, and auditable agent proposals.
defaultPrompt: Create Taskara tasks from this plan.
